final_text:
The information is clear. `FileField` extends `Field`, and its `clean` method handles all three states using `FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION`.

```json
{"file":"django/forms/fields.py","class":"FileField","method":"clean","parent_class":"Field","fix_summary":"FileField.clean() sits above to_python() and distinguishes the three states by raising a ValidationError when data is FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION (both a file and the clear checkbox were submitted), returning False (or delegating to the required check) when data is False (clear checkbox only), returning initial unchanged when no new data is provided (keep existing file), and only then delegating to super().clean() — which calls to_python() — for an actual new upload."}
```
